headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Healthpeak Properties, Raises Price Target to $21
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $19 to $21.
